sentences.target: Je fais la pâte pour la pizza.
sentences.reading: /ʒə fɛ la pɑt puʁ la pidza/

translations.fr: Je fais la pâte pour la pizza.
translations.ipa: /ʒə fɛ la pɑt puʁ la pidza/
translations.en: I'm making the dough for the pizza.
translations.es: Estoy haciendo la masa para la pizza.
translations.de: Ich mache den Teig für die Pizza.
translations.it: Sto facendo l'impasto per la pizza.
translations.yue: 我而家整緊個薄餅嘅麵糰。
translations.pt: Estou preparando a massa da pizza.
translations.vi: Tôi đang làm bột nhào cho pizza.
translations.nl: Ik maak het deeg voor de pizza.
translations.hi: मैं पिज़्ज़ा के लिए आटा बना रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Φτιάχνω τη ζύμη για την πίτσα.
translations.id: Saya sedang membuat adonan untuk pizza.
translations.ja: ピザの生地を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pâte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'fais'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pizza'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional complement 'pour la pizza'.

sentences.target: Tu peux étaler la pâte s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø etale la pɑt sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux étaler la pâte s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø etale la pɑt sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you roll out the dough, please?
translations.ja: 生地を伸ばしてください。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Finite verb, present indicative 2nd person singular of the modal 'pouvoir'; selects the infinitive 'étaler'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'peux'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pâte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'étaler'.
Elided form of 'si il'; introduces the subordinate clause in the fixed polite expression 's'il te plaît'.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object of 'plaît'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; head of the subordinate clause in the formula 's'il te plaît'.

sentences.target: La pâte colle partout sur la table.
sentences.reading: /la pɑt kɔl paʁtu syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: La pâte colle partout sur la table.
translations.ipa: /la pɑt kɔl paʁtu syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: The dough is sticking everywhere on the table.
translations.es: La masa se está pegando por toda la mesa.
translations.de: Der Teig klebt überall auf dem Tisch.
translations.it: L'impasto si appiccica dappertutto sul tavolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 面团在桌子上到处都粘住了。
translations.yue: 個麵糰喺枱面到處都黐住。
translations.pt: A massa está grudando em toda a mesa.
translations.vi: Bột nhào dính khắp mặt bàn.
translations.ar: العجين يلتصق في كل مكان على الطاولة.
translations.nl: Het deeg plakt overal op de tafel.
translations.hu: A tészta mindenhol ráragad az asztalra.
translations.hi: आटा मेज़ पर हर जगह चिपक रहा है.
translations.pl: Ciasto przykleja się wszędzie do stołu.
translations.el: Η ζύμη κολλάει παντού πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Deigen klistrer seg overalt på bordet.
translations.ro: Aluatul se lipește peste tot pe masă.
translations.cs: Těsto se lepí všude na stole.
translations.ja: 生地がテーブルのあちこちにくっついている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pâte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'colle'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Adverb of place; modifies 'colle'.
Preposition introducing a location complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On laisse reposer la pâte trente minutes.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ lɛs ʁəpoze la pɑt tʁɑ̃t minyt/

translations.fr: On laisse reposer la pâte trente minutes.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ lɛs ʁəpoze la pɑt tʁɑ̃t minyt/
translations.en: We're letting the dough rest for thirty minutes.
translations.es: Dejamos reposar la masa durante treinta minutos.
translations.de: Wir lassen den Teig dreißig Minuten ruhen.
translations.it: Lasciamo riposare l'impasto per trenta minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们让面团静置三十分钟。
translations.yue: 我哋會等個麵糰靜置三十分鐘。
translations.ru: Мы оставляем тесто отдыхать на тридцать минут.
translations.pt: Vamos deixar a massa descansar por trinta minutos.
translations.he: אנחנו נותנים לבצק לנוח במשך שלושים דקות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi để bột nhào nghỉ trong ba mươi phút.
translations.ar: نترك العجين ليرتاح لمدة ثلاثين دقيقة.
translations.nl: We laten het deeg dertig minuten rusten.
translations.uk: Ми залишаємо тісто відпочити на тридцять хвилин.
translations.hi: हम आटे को तीस मिनट तक आराम करने दे रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Zostawiamy ciasto, żeby odpoczęło przez trzydzieści minut.
translations.el: Αφήνουμε τη ζύμη να ξεκουραστεί για τριάντα λεπτά.
translations.nb: Vi lar deigen hvile i tretti minutter.
translations.id: Kami membiarkan adonan istirahat selama tiga puluh menit.
translations.sv: Vi låter degen vila i trettio minuter.
translations.ro: Lăsăm aluatul să se odihnească timp de treizeci de minute.
translations.da: Vi lader dejen hvile i tredive minutter.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; here colloquial for 'we'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular agreeing with 'on'; causative verb.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'laisse' indicating the action allowed.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pâte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'laisser reposer'.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'minutes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; duration complement.
